triple_overlap_resolution.subject: OANDABroker metrics= not injected - production instrumentation dead path
triple_overlap_resolution.rationale: DM-402 and DE-402 describe same defect (metrics= not passed in runner.py:343/main.py:335). forward_test.py:239 is DE-402-unique but not production LIVE path. DM-402 canonical. DE-402 is duplicate.
triple_overlap_resolution.forward_test_py_status: DE-402 forward_test.py:239 verified correct but not production LIVE path so no severity change.

adversarial_review.criticism: bypass requires OS filesystem access or insider. Zero current harm in 22 LIVE strategies.
adversarial_review.evidence: post_fix_verification: warmup drift absent in 22 LIVE strategies

adversarial_review.criticism: Identical defect to DM-402. DM-402 is canonical. DE-402 is duplicate.

fact_check.alerting_rules_yml_98_111: max>60 for 3m fires constantly for H1. Mathematically certain.
fact_check.live_store_comment_434: live_store.py:434 states bar interval is intent. Conflicts with 60s threshold.

adversarial_review.criticism: live_store.py:434 explicitly states bar interval is design intent producing ~3600s for H1. 60s threshold in alerting_rules is inconsistent from design.
adversarial_review.counter_proposal: Quick: alerting_rules.yml threshold >=7200s. Root: semantics change to current_time-last_bar_time on heartbeat.

adversarial_review.criticism: DE-404 and DM-403 share same root cause. Bundle with DM-402 PR.

fact_check.quality_engine_py_736_786: Friday 22:00 UTC fixed. DST not considered. Fact.

adversarial_review.criticism: DST impact ~32 H1 bars/year (52wk x 0.62 x 1bar). Holidays ~3 days. Total ~35 bars/year. Forced publish absorbs parity impact. Low harm.
adversarial_review.evidence: 52 weeks x 0.62 = ~32 bars/year plus ~3 holiday bars
adversarial_review.counter_proposal: Downgrade to low. Defer zoneinfo migration.

fact_check.runner_py_1608_1631: RE-305 uses periodic refire but DE-303 does not. Inconsistency fact.

adversarial_review.criticism: DE-406 suggested fix (periodic refire in DE-303) worsens DM-404. DE-303 refiring every 30min collides with 12h throttle. Must resolve DESIGN-C-001 first.
adversarial_review.evidence: DE-406 fix adds periodic refire to DE-303 => DM-404 throttle collision guaranteed
adversarial_review.counter_proposal: Resolve DESIGN-C-001 first then decide DE-406 fix direction.

fact_check.parity_test_dir: tests/parity lacks asymmetric warmup test. Fact.

adversarial_review.criticism: High period strategy cannot reach LIVE unless DE-401 bypass performed first. 22 LIVE strategies have zero high-period strategies currently. Test gap is future safety net.

adversarial_review.counter_proposal: Medium maintained. Implement alongside DE-401 fix.

adversarial_review.evidence: candle_fetcher.py:416: async def backfill_missing. fault/test_oanda_reconnect_backfill.py tests it.

findings_review.post_fix_defect_assessment: confirmed core problem correct but evidence partially inaccurate

fact_check.live_store_py_617_625: cache_valid uses last_ts+len only. Head timestamp unchecked. Fact.

adversarial_review.criticism: Trim with unchanged tail ts requires aux TF duplicate-second bar. Extremely rare. Cache invalidates correctly in normal operation. Low severity appropriate. 1-line fix.

fact_check.live_store_py_215_219: _last_primary_bar_time=None init. warmup and normal poll share same path. Fact.

adversarial_review.criticism: DE-403 fix raising threshold to >=7200s would make warmup transition age_sec (H1 max ~3600s) fall below threshold, eliminating false FIRING. Fix DE-403 first then re-evaluate DE-410.
adversarial_review.evidence: DE-403 fix (A): threshold >=7200s. Warmup H1 age_sec max ~3600s below new threshold.

fact_check.broker_gateway_407_410: cancel_order: return await broker.cancel_order only. No BrokerUnavailableError wrapping. Fact.

adversarial_review.criticism: If StrategySlot catches only BrokerUnavailableError, cancel_order ConnectionError leaks. Document exception policy in docstring first.
OANDA API returns ISO 8601 with timezone. tz-naive injection via normal path is rare. Low appropriate.
CPython sleep(0) x2 provides 2 coroutine switches. Sufficient for 1-await KillSwitch. No current flaky reports. Future risk hypothetical. Low appropriate.

fact_check.email_notifier_808: Falls back to generic Live anomaly label. Triage impossible by subject. Fact.

adversarial_review.criticism: alert_type is in body so info not lost. Subject filter inability is operational inconvenience not functional failure. 3-line fix. Joint with DM-405.

adversarial_review.criticism: close_trade latency directly impacts fill-close delays and slippage. FxOandaApiLatencyHigh blind to close_trade. Bundle with DM-402 PR.

fact_check.runner_py_1608_1631: RE-305 publishes live_orders_silent at 30-multiples. Comment says notify until recovery. Fact.
fact_check.email_notifier_349: live_orders_silent throttle=43200s (12h). 30-min periodic refire suppressed. Mathematically certain.

adversarial_review.criticism: RE-305 continuous notification design conflicts with live_orders_silent 12h throttle introduced without cross-audit coordination. Also conflicts with DE-406. Option A (dedicated kind with throttle=0) is most consistent. Requires DESIGN-C-001 decision.
adversarial_review.counter_proposal: User decision first (DESIGN-C-001). Recommend option A: separate kind oanda_poll_error_escalation.

fact_check.email_notifier_827_840: Response procedure text inappropriate for OANDA connection loss (shows phantom exposure steps). Fact.

Prometheus+Grafana is Phase 2 (CLAUDE.md). Email-only Phase 1 acceptable. DM-402 fix enables Prometheus counters as byproduct. alerting_rules additions deferred.
Managing kind list in comments is root problem. Consolidating to _RISK_ALERT_KINDS is structural solution. Replace metrics.py comment with single-line reference to _RISK_ALERT_KINDS.

design_decisions_required.description: Resolve conflict: RE-305 continuous notification design (fires every 30-multiples) vs live_orders_silent 12h throttle (user request 2026-05-29)
options: A: Separate RE-305 path to dedicated kind oanda_poll_error_escalation with throttle=0
B: Change RE-305 design to send only 1 initial notification
